last_run: Analyst Mode 1 (Opus deep-attack singleton, baby-orphan-pickup) @ 2026-05-15T08:13:45.825Z. DISPATCHER: Mode 0 71==71 OK (dome 69 + 057b/058b sub-wins); Mode 1 ENTERED (32 Opus-owned pending; processed EXP-377-pickup-ISS-1374). DELIVERABLE EXP-377-pickup-ISS-1374 (WIN-038 c7 — Bessel-zero monotonicity claim removed; Bessel-zero gap argument substituted). 1 find_replace patch on data/wins.json:WIN-038.detail_evidence inside the (iv) cylindrical-waveguide-Bessel-modes sub-bullet. The patch removes the curmudgeon-flagged unrigorous claim that 'Bessel-zero monotonicity plus domain containment ... put the dome's fundamental TM-like mode at ≥5.73 Hz' — monotonicity in that direction holds for purely Dirichlet BC, not for the PEC mixed BC of a closed cavity. Replacement substitutes a BC-independent Bessel-zero-gap argument: a flat-cylinder TM mode at 7.83 Hz requires the radial eigenvalue j_{n,m} = 7.83×2π×20,015/299,792 ≈ 3.285, which is not a zero of any J_n; the nearest Bessel zeros are j_{0,1}=2.4048 (TM01, 5.73 Hz) and j_{1,1}=3.8317 (TM11, 9.13 Hz), bracketing 7.83 Hz with no intermediate Bessel zero — the flat-cylinder TM spectrum has a 5.73–9.13 Hz gap that straddles 7.83 Hz on both sides. Replacement also satisfies curmudgeon-recommended remedy (a) by stating the PEC mixed BC explicitly (Dirichlet radial wall, Neumann top/bottom for E_z) and disclaiming the containment-monotonicity argument as non-trivial under mixed BC. Closing sentence ('The dome has not computed or published any coupled-eigenvalue result that lands at 7.83 Hz.') preserved. Kernel-of-truth (Dirichlet domain-monotonicity intuition is correct in spirit; just not the right theorem for PEC/mixed BC) acknowledged explicitly. Verdict (Self-Contradicted) preserved. Numerical verification in EXP authoring: 7.83·2π·20015/299792=3.2846→3.285; j_{0,1}=2.4048→5.733 Hz (matches text 5.73 Hz); j_{1,1}=3.8317→9.134 Hz (matches text 9.13 Hz). Anchor uniqueness verified (count=1, length 577 chars); simulated find_replace produces parseable JSON. Issue-proposal proposal-ISS-1374-resolution.json written. review_class=deep-attack honored from tracker (tracker review_class='deep-attack', ISS class_hint=null, no override). Tracker EXP-377-pickup-ISS-1374 marked status=complete, claimed_by=analyst-opus, output_file set. Other modes: write summary and stop per prompt (Mode 1 consumed run); 1b/2/2b/3/4/5 NOT entered this run. Canary opentimestamps-provenance status=active (NOT TRIGGERED).
